descricao: A set of 4 integrated automations for Stripe payment management: first-payment link generation, monthly installment creation, deposit (signal) generation, and payment status updates.
problema: Managing installment billing was done manually — creating invoices, tracking payments and updating each student's status individually.
resultado: An end-to-end automated system: from the first charge to tracking every installment.
metrica: 100% automated billing management with 4 integrated flows
destaques: 4 integrated workflows (initial payment, installments, deposits, tracking)
Invoice generation and delivery via Stripe API
Data table as the single source of truth
